# Image fixtures

`colors-no-alpha.heic` is the 64×64 HEVC fixture from the libheif fuzzing corpus:

- Source: <https://github.com/strukturag/libheif/blob/master/fuzzing/data/corpus/colors-no-alpha.heic>
- Upstream project license: LGPL-3.0-or-later
- Purpose: deterministic local verification of HEIC decoding; this test directory is excluded from the npm package.
